code: import api from'./api';const authService={login:async(username,password)=>{const response=await api.post('/auth/login',{username,password});return response.data;},register:async userData=>{const response=await api.post('/auth/register',userData);return response.data;},logout:()=>{localStorage.removeItem('token');localStorage.removeItem('user');},getCurrentUser:()=>{const user=localStorage.getItem('user');return user?JSON.parse(user):null;},isAuthenticated:()=>{return!!localStorage.getItem('token');}};export default authService;
